title: SG MRT PIDS V2 [MTR4]
description: A Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS (V2) custom presets for the Joban Client Mod, and Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.
body:
**A Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS (V2) custom presets for the Joban Client Mod, and Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.**

Thanks for downloading my Singapore MRT-inspired PIDS resource pack! Feel free to contact me for more details/improvement! Appreciate it! ~ AbsurdlySmrt

![A PIDS screengrab of the TEL-inspired RATIS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b3zNH416/images/6d40588be9dc6f8d27efded7faba4087ac741301.png)

CONTENT:
=========================
PIDS based on the real life Singapore MRT Lines: 
- East-West
- North-South
- Thomson-East Coast
- Downtown
- Circle


REQUIRED MINECRAFT MOD:
=========================
This Resource Pack **requires** the following:

[**Minecraft Transit Railway**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)
*Tested and worked on MTR4. May not work for MTR3.2.2. or below

[**Joban Client Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)

UTILISATION IN-GAME:
=========================
With the [**Joban Client Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm), head over to one of the desired PIDS Railway Vision.

Under "PIDS Preset", hover down to the "Custom Preset" segment and the custom presets can be found there.

For a quick visual walkthrough guide:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NF4LuAhw-To" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
